'''rasupu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jobsmith|jobsmith]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-s-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jobsmith|jobsmith]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rasupu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræsipith|ræsipith]] || [[word:ræsipij|ræsipij]] || [[word:ræsipish|ræsipish]] || [[word:ræsipi|ræsipi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rasusuputh|rasusuputh]] || [[word:rasusupuj|rasusupuj]] || [[word:rasusupush|rasusupush]] || [[word:rasusupu|rasusupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rasuputh|rasuputh]] || [[word:rasupuj|rasupuj]] || [[word:rasupush|rasupush]] || [[word:rasupu|rasupu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rasufputh|rasufputh]] || [[word:rasufpuj|rasufpuj]] || [[word:rasufpush|rasufpush]] || [[word:rasufpuf|rasufpuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rasuputhu|rasuputhu]] || [[word:rasupuju|rasupuju]] || [[word:rasupushu|rasupushu]] || [[word:rasupuku|rasupuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rasuputh|rasuputh]] || [[word:rasupuj|rasupuj]] || [[word:rasupush|rasupush]] || [[word:rasupu|rasupu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rasuputhul|rasuputhul]] || [[word:rasupujul|rasupujul]] || [[word:rasupushul|rasupushul]] || [[word:rasupukul|rasupukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rasuputhuthu|rasuputhuthu]] || [[word:rasupujuju|rasupujuju]] || [[word:rasupushushu|rasupushushu]] || [[word:rasupuku|rasupuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rasuputhun|rasuputhun]] || [[word:rasupujun|rasupujun]] || [[word:rasupushun|rasupushun]] || [[word:rasupukun|rasupukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rasuputhuoro|rasuputhuoro]] || [[word:rasupujuoro|rasupujuoro]] || [[word:rasupushuoro|rasupushuoro]] || [[word:rasupukuoro|rasupukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
